name: libhtml-wikiconverter-mediawiki-perl
title: libhtml-wikiconverter-mediawiki-perl
summary: Perl module to add MediaWiki markup support to HTML::WikiConverter
description:
Perl module to add MediaWiki markup support to HTML::WikiConverter
HTML::WikiConverter::MediaWiki contains rules for converting HTML into
MediaWiki markup, used by HTML::WikiConverter and 'html2wiki' command.
See the libhtml-wikiconverter-perl package for more information.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libhtml-wikiconverter-mediawiki-perl because Perl module to add MediaWiki markup support to HTML::WikiConverter.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libhtml-wikiconverter-mediawiki-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libhtml-wikiconverter-mediawiki-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libhtml-wikiconverter-mediawiki-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
